case_title: CACH, LLC VS. RONALD P FARNSWORTH et al

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY DEFENDANT FARNSWORTH, RONALD P AN INDIVIDUAL HEARING SET FOR FEB-08-2013 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
OPPOSITION TO DEFTS DEMURRER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC
MINI MINUTES FOR FEB-08-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT RONALD FARNSWORTH'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO MARCH 13, 2013, TO GIVE THE OPPOSING PARTY A CHANCE TO COMPLY WITH SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6B. THE OPPOSING PARTY SHALL PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY OF ITS PAPERS WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE BY FEBRUARY 15, 2013. JUDGE: MARLA MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING WHICH WAS NOT CONTESTED. DEFENDANT RONALD FARNSWORTH'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 15 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. THE COURT DID NOT RECEIVE PLAINTIFF'S COURTESY COPY OF ITS OPPOSITION (AS REQUIRED BY SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6B AND THE COURT'S ORDER OF FEBRUARY 8, 2013) UNTIL MARCH 12, 2013. (THE ENVELOPE CONTAINING THE COURTESY COPY IS POSTMARKED MARCH 7, 2013.) ON FEBRUARY 8, 2013, THE COURT ORDERED THAT COURTESY COPIES MUST BE PROVIDED BY FEBRUARY 15, 2013. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO DO SO. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185
ORDER SUSTAINING DEMURRER WITH LEAVE TO AMEND
MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-13-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-11-2014 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Robert Cohen, Esq. appearing specially for Plaintiff. Court ordered case dismissed without prejudice at the request of Plaintiff. JUDGE CYNTHIA M. LEE; Clerk KCOX; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-19-2013 Continued To Feb-11-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-05-2013 Continued To Dec-24-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-13-2013 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ronald P. Farnsworth, defendant and moving party, appearing on his own behalf;
No other appearance.

RULING: The court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANT RONALD FARNSWORTH's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with 15 days leave to amend. The Court did not receive Plaintiff's courtesy copy of its opposition (as required by San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B and the Court's order of February 8, 2013) until March 12, 2013. (The envelope containing the courtesy copy is postmarked March 7, 2013.) On February 8, 2013, the Court ordered that courtesy copies must be provided by February 15, 2013. Plaintiff failed to do so. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-08-2013 Continued To Mar-13-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT RONALD FARNSWORTH'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to March 13, 2013, to give the opposing party a chance to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. The opposing party shall provide a courtesy copy of its papers with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date by February 15, 2013. Judge: Marla Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
